utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format lists 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now check the final coverage plan:
- health_coverage: Present. It includes physical and mental health insurance with named plans and both monthly and annual costs. Fully specified per requirement.
- property_coverage: Present. It provides home/contents insurance with a base plan and optional add-ons, each with monthly and annual costs. Costs are specified; coverage type aligns with home/contents. Fully specified.
- travel_coverage: Present with a plan name and monthly/annual costs. Fully specified.
- additional_services: Present with a photography_work_coverage add-on, description, and costs. Fully specified.
- total_budget: Present with monthly and annual breakdowns for scenarios (with and without optional add-ons). Fully specified.
All 5 required items appear and include the needed cost details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify each plan named in the final coverage plan and find the exact matching item in the ground-truth ratings. Mappings found: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) -> rating 9 under primary_health_coverage.physical_health. LifeFirst Mental Health Plan appears as a mental plan in the final plan but does not exist in the ground-truth list; therefore, it cannot be mapped. HomeFirst Standard Coverage -> rating 9 under property_protection.home_content. Smart Home Integration and Emergency Response Service are optional add-ons listed under property_enhancement_services with ratings 4 and 3 respectively. LifeFirst Standard Travel Plan with Extreme Activity Protection corresponds to LifeFirst Standard Plan in travel_insurance -> rating 9; the “with Extreme Activity Protection” modifier is not a separate item in ground truth, so map to the base LifeFirst Standard Plan travel entry. Photography Work Coverage add-on for equipment & liability does not exist as a named item in ground truth; cannot map.
